title: Kandy Cultural Heritage
shortDescription: Visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth, stroll Kandy Lake and enjoy a traditional dance performance.
description: Discover the hill capital of Sri Lanka on a one-day cultural immersion. Visit the UNESCO-listed Temple of the Tooth Relic, take a peaceful walk around Kandy Lake, explore the bustling Kandy Market and end the evening with a vibrant traditional Kandyan dance and drumming show.
included: Temple of the Tooth entrance fee

itinerary.details: Morning pickup, Temple of the Tooth visit, Kandy Lake walk, market stroll, afternoon free, evening dance show, return transfer.
